name: Xero Accounting MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Xero accounting software — enabling AI agents to access and manage Xero accounts, invoices, contacts, bank transactions, and financial reports. Allows AI agents to read financial data, create invoices, and interact with Xero's cloud accounting platform for SME businesses.
use_cases: Querying and creating invoices in Xero from accounts receivable automation agents
Retrieving financial reports and P&L data from business intelligence agents
Managing contacts and supplier records in Xero from vendor management agents
Automating bank reconciliation workflows with Xero data from finance agents
not_for: Large enterprise accounting (Xero is optimized for SMEs)
Real-time financial reporting requiring sub-second latency
Jurisdictions where Xero has limited tax compliance support
best_when: A small to medium business using Xero wants AI agents to automate accounting workflows — generating invoices, reconciling transactions, retrieving reports — without manual Xero navigation.
avoid_when: You use different accounting software (QuickBooks, Sage, NetSuite). FINANCIAL RISK: Autonomous financial data modification requires human oversight.

auth.notes: Xero OAuth 2.0. Registered Xero app required. Use minimal scopes — accounting.transactions.read for read-only, accounting.transactions for write access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Xero free trial available; paid subscription required
pricing.notes: Xero subscription required. Community MCP server is free open source. Xero API access requires Xero account.

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Agents creating or modifying financial records require human approval workflow
Xero tenant selection: multi-org users must explicitly select the correct organization
Rate limits: 5000/day limit is easy to hit with bulk financial data operations
OAuth token refresh required for long-running accounting automation agents
Xero API versioning: pin to API version to avoid breaking changes
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Financial records modification. OAuth with minimal scopes. Xero account data is highly sensitive. SOC2 certified. Human oversight required for write operations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial accounting data — highly sensitive. OAuth minimal scopes. SOC2/ISO27001 certified. Write access requires human oversight. Tenant isolation critical.
